summary: Amazon Warehouse Associate with picking, packing, inventory management, cleaning equipment, Kaizen, 5S, Kanban; experienced in e‑commerce fulfillment and laboratory inventory; future project: lead a lean‑six sigma initiative to boost warehouse throughput.

Security Guard with Investigation skills, Safety compliance, Criminal justice knowledge, Restraining devices, Martial arts/Physical combat training; experienced in military and defense sectors; future project: lead a threat assessment and response program for a defense contractor.

Personal Trainer with Knowledge in Nutrition, Proficient at sales, Self‑motivated, Organized, Energetic and upbeat, Effective communicator; experienced in personal and group fitness; future project: develop a virtual fitness coaching platform for high‑end clients.

Video Production Assistant with Premiere Pro, Avid NLE, audio editing, scriptwriting, call sheets, camera boom, light boom, mic boom, DaVinci Resolve; experienced in commercials and short films; future project: lead post‑production for a branded content series.

UX Designer with Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, Sketch, InVision, wireframing, prototyping, usability testing, A/B testing, analytics, HTML5, CSS, JavaScript, strong communication, stakeholder collaboration, problem solving; experienced in financial technology and blockchain; future project: leading a cross‑platform redesign of a fintech mobile app to boost user retention.

Travel Agent with domestic & international travel expertise, budgeting & accounting, logistical planning, itineraries, reservations, travel consulting, organization, time management, communication; experienced in Travel and Tourism industries; future project: lead a sustainable travel consulting initiative for African destinations.

Senior Fashion Designer with product design, market research, sketching, technical design, vendor management, leadership, communication; experienced in women’s high‑end footwear and accessories; future project: lead a sustainable luxury shoe collection for a top‑tier brand.

Nutrition Consultant with Food preparation, kitchen maintenance, kitchen equipment operation, food sanitation, nutrition, counseling, education; experienced in nutrition services in healthcare and senior living; future project: lead a community nutrition outreach program for underserved seniors.
